LCOD_TEXT_SLIDER_INDEX_TEXT1: ¡Reuniendo a empresas y expertos independientes en comercio exterior para lograr el éxito global!
LCOD_TEXT_SLIDER_INDEX_DESC1: Babroo elimina fronteras al reunir a las empresas de importación y exportación con expertos únicos en comercio exterior.
LCOD_TEXT_SLIDER_INDEX_TEXT2: Cargue sus productos gratis en Babroo, ¡conozca compradores de todo el mundo!
LCOD_TEXT_SLIDER_INDEX_DESC2: Abre las puertas a los mercados globales subiendo tus productos a nuestra plataforma de forma totalmente gratuita. La forma más sencilla de llegar a tu público objetivo y ganarte un lugar en el comercio internacional está diseñada para ti.
LCOD_TEXT_SLIDER_INDEX_TEXT3: ¡Punto de Encuentro de Servicios y Oportunidades en Comercio Exterior!
LCOD_TEXT_SLIDER_INDEX_DESC3: Babroo es una plataforma única que reúne a empresas que desean realizar comercio exterior con expertos en comercio exterior y proveedores de servicios que pueden brindar servicios independientes.
LCOD_TEXT_WHY_CHOOSE_US_2: Babroo es una plataforma diseñada para ayudarte a tener éxito en el comercio exterior. Simplifica sus procesos de exportación y reduce sus costos al establecer una fuerte conexión entre expertos en comercio exterior y empresas.
LCOD_TEXT_WHY_CHOOSE_US_3: Negociación segura y rápida: Babroo proporciona una experiencia comercial rápida al tiempo que garantiza la seguridad de todas sus transacciones.
LCOD_TEXT_WHY_CHOOSE_US_4: Bajo costo: Puede iniciar el comercio exterior rápidamente con Babroo a bajos costos.
LCOD_TEXT_WHY_CHOOSE_US_5: Amplia Red de Compradores y Proveedores: Podrás llegar a diversos compradores y proveedores gracias a nuestra amplia red en el sector.
LCOD_TEXT_WHY_CHOOSE_US_7: Fácil de usar y seguimiento de transacciones: Puede realizar un seguimiento fácil de sus transacciones desde cualquier lugar con la interfaz fácil de usar de nuestra plataforma
LCOD_TEXT_WHY_CHOOSE_US_8: Experiencia en el campo: Puede obtener soluciones que se adapten a sus necesidades trabajando con diferentes proveedores de servicios.
LCOD_TEXT_ACCEPT_COOKIES: Este sitio web utiliza cookies para brindarle una excelente experiencia de usuario. Al usarlo, aceptas nuestro uso de cookies.
LCOD_TEXT_SERVICES_INDEX_DESC1: Regístrese rápidamente con un breve formulario. Cargue sus productos o solicitudes de forma gratuita y conéctese con importadores y exportadores de todo el mundo.
LCOD_TEXT_SERVICES_INDEX_TITLE2: Paso 2: Conéctese con expertos en comercio exterior
LCOD_TEXT_SERVICES_INDEX_DESC2: Conozca expertos en comercio exterior y proveedores de servicios que facilitarán sus procesos de comercio exterior. Encuentre soluciones para respaldar sus transacciones contactando a los expertos que satisfagan sus necesidades.
LCOD_TEXT_SERVICES_INDEX_DESC3: Conéctese rápidamente con su panel de expertos en comercio exterior y proveedores de servicios. ¡En esta etapa, aproveche las oportunidades favorables y amplíe su red comercial!
LCOD_TEXT_SERVICES_INDEX_DESC4: Una vez que hayas establecido tus conexiones, inicia tus procesos de comercio exterior. ¡Ocupe su lugar en el mercado global con Babroo!
LCOD_TEXT_ADVANTAGES_INDEX_DESC1: Trabajando con expertos experimentados que conocen el mercado y el producto; aumentas tu velocidad de entrada al mercado global.
LCOD_TEXT_ADVANTAGES_INDEX_DESC2: Tienes acceso a solicitudes de compra/venta en todo el mundo proporcionadas por Babroo.
LCOD_TEXT_ADVANTAGES_INDEX_DESC3: Reduzca la carga operativa y concéntrese en su negocio principal.
LCOD_TEXT_ADVANTAGES_INDEX_DESC4: Realice un seguimiento de su proceso de Comercio Exterior y gane rapidez.
LCOD_TEXT_ADVANTAGES_INDEX_TITLE5: Interfaz flexible y fácil de usar
LCOD_TEXT_ADVANTAGES_INDEX_DESC5: Plataforma innovadora que satisface sus necesidades de fácil uso.
LCOD_TEXT_ADVANTAGES_INDEX_DESC6: Acceso de comercio exterior a los proveedores de servicios que necesita.
LCOD_TEXT_BANNER_1: Deja de perder tiempo y dinero en comercio exterior.
LCOD_TEXT_BANNER_2: Regístrate ahora y empieza a disfrutar de los beneficios de comprar con precios ventajosos.
LCOD_TEXT_COMPANY_DESC: Fundada en el año 2006, nuestra empresa continúa operando en sectores que traen divisas a nuestro país bajo el nombre de Amazing Technology and Marketing Inc.
LCOD_TEXT_ABOUT_US_SUB_TEXT: Empiece a trabajar con Babroo ahora y obtenga lo que necesita en comercio internacional.
LCOD_TEXT_1: El software Babroo, desarrollado por nuestro equipo fundador con años de experiencia en la industria y el comercio exterior, permite a los fabricantes y profesionales ser libres mientras logran sus sueños.
LCOD_TEXT_2: Con esta visión, estamos orgullosos de crear la comunidad de profesionales del comercio exterior más grande de Turquía.
LCOD_TEXT_3: Empoderamos a los profesionales del comercio exterior a través de colaboraciones directas basadas en proyectos con empresas, brindándoles libertad y la oportunidad de obtener más ingresos.
LCOD_TEXT_4: También brindamos a las empresas la oportunidad de participar en el mercado mundial de una manera simple y rastreable, lejos de los riesgos del empleo directo con expertos en comercio exterior.
LCOD_TEXT_FOR_COMPANIES_OF_ALL_LEVELS: para empresas de todos los niveles
LCOD_LBL_DO_IT_EXPORT_WITH_US: ¡Comercie y abra mercados globales fácilmente con Babroo!
LCOD_LBL_FTS_SPEC_TITLE2: Paso 2: conozca a los clientes adecuados
LCOD_LBL_FTS_SPEC_TITLE4: Paso 4: convierta su experiencia en ingresos
LCOD_LBL_FTS_SPEC_DESC1: Identifique su área de especialización y únase a la comunidad Babroo completando nuestro breve y sencillo formulario de registro. ¡Crea tu perfil y ocupa tu lugar en el mercado global!
LCOD_LBL_FTS_SPEC_DESC2: Conéctese rápidamente con las empresas adecuadas para sus necesidades en Babroo. ¡No pierdas la oportunidad de aprovechar al máximo tu experiencia!
LCOD_LBL_FTS_SPEC_DESC3: Amplíe su red conociendo empresas de su industria. Utilice sus habilidades profesionales para agregar valor a sus clientes potenciales y aumentar sus ingresos.
LCOD_LBL_FTS_SPEC_DESC4: Reciba pagos por sus servicios a tiempo y de forma segura. Trabaje con Babroo con un modelo de ingresos justo y transparente en cada etapa de su negocio.
LCOD_LBL_FTS_ADVANTAGES_TITLE1: Oportunidades para expandirse a diferentes sectores
LCOD_LBL_FTS_ADVANTAGES_DESC: Podrás encontrar oportunidades de trabajar con empresas de diferentes sectores, para que puedas adquirir nuevas experiencias ampliando tu área de especialización.
LCOD_LBL_FTS_ADVANTAGES_DESC2: La oportunidad de trabajar con empresas de diferentes países ayuda a desarrollar sus habilidades comerciales internacionales y le permite adquirir experiencia en el mercado global.
LCOD_LBL_FTS_ADVANTAGES_DESC3: Babroo apoya el desarrollo profesional de expertos ofreciendo una variedad de capacitaciones y recursos. Puede aumentar sus conocimientos y habilidades con oportunidades de aprendizaje continuo.
LCOD_LBL_FTS_ADVANTAGES_DESC4: Puede aumentar sus ingresos participando en proyectos adecuados para sus áreas de especialización. Ofrece varias oportunidades para convertir su experiencia en comercio exterior en ganancias.
LCOD_LBL_FTS_ADVANTAGES_DESC5: Puede ganar con expertos y empresas que vengan a Babroo con su código de referencia.
LCOD_LBL_FTS_ADVANTAGES_DESC6: Ofrece la oportunidad de trabajar cuando y donde quieras, sin estar atado a un lugar de trabajo fijo.
LCOD_LBL_WAW_UPPER_TEXT1: Babroo tiene como objetivo crear valor en la red de comercio exterior en todo el mundo.
LCOD_LBL_WAW_UPPER_TEXT2: Creemos que combinando nuestra experiencia en comercio exterior con nuestro carácter innovador y emprendedor; Creamos una forma fácil y rápida de proceso de comercio exterior para las empresas y sus agentes.
LCOD_TEXT_ABOUT_US_DESCRIPTION_TEXT1: Fundada en 2006, nuestra empresa continúa operando en sectores que traen divisas a nuestro país bajo el nombre de Amazing Technology and Marketing Inc. Nuestros campos de actividad son la exportación, la exportación electrónica y el turismo. Nuestra empresa ha exportado cerca de 20 millones de dólares anuales a más de 50 países, especialmente países europeos.
LCOD_LBL_PACKAGES_BOTTOM_TEXT: Si el pago se realiza mediante transferencia bancaria/efectivo electrónico, se debe completar el formulario de información básica de membresía y enviarlo por correo electrónico a info@babroo.com. Después de que el sistema babroo.com reciba la información básica de membresía, su nombre de usuario, contraseña temporal y procesos de información de membresía se enviarán a su dirección de correo electrónico.
LCOD_LBL_TAB1_QUEST_1: ¿Por qué debería convertirme en miembro? ¿Por qué debo pagar una tarifa de membresía/listado de productos al principio?
LCOD_LBL_TAB1_ANSWER_1: Nuestro objetivo es brindarle un acceso rápido al mercado global asegurándonos de que los especialistas que tengan experiencia en comercio exterior con su producto y que ya tengan una cartera de clientes estén interesados ​​en su producto. Queremos que especialistas con experiencia en comercio exterior adopten su producto y sus características y lo ofrezcan a sus clientes lo antes posible.
LCOD_LBL_TAB1_QUEST_2: ¿Cómo proporciona Babroo ventajas a mi empresa?
LCOD_LBL_TAB1_ANSWER_2: Reduce o elimina el coste del departamento de comercio exterior de su empresa, encuentra nuevos mercados y clientes a los que importar/exportar sus productos, y los especialistas en comercio exterior registrados en Babroo intentan trabajar para vender sus productos, aumentando así su facturación y beneficios.
LCOD_LBL_TAB1_ANSWER_3: Esto muestra que los cambios dependen de la situación del mercado.
LCOD_LBL_TAB1_QUEST_4: ¿Existe alguna limitación en el grupo de productos a exportar?
LCOD_LBL_TAB1_ANSWER_4: Estamos creciendo a medida que pasan los días con nuestros experimentados especialistas en comercio exterior en muchos grupos de productos; por lo tanto, no existe limitación en ningún grupo de productos.
LCOD_LBL_TAB1_QUEST_5: ¿Quién se hará cargo de mí y de las exportaciones de mi empresa?
LCOD_LBL_TAB1_ANSWER_5: Si se llega a un acuerdo después de que se proporcione la comparación en nuestro sitio, un especialista en comercio exterior que tenga experiencia en su producto y tenga una cartera de clientes de importación/exportación se ocupará de su importación y exportación. Además, buscarán clientes en nuestra cartera de especialistas en comercio exterior, que son expertos en su producto en muchos países del mundo.
LCOD_LBL_TAB1_QUEST_6: ¿Tiene una empresa de despacho de aduanas y envío contratada?
LCOD_LBL_TAB1_ANSWER_6: Sí, los agentes de aduanas y las empresas de transporte se encuentran entre nuestros socios de soluciones. Si lo deseas, podrás beneficiarte de precios especiales para socios de babroo.
LCOD_LBL_TAB1_QUEST_7: ¿Quién se encarga de los trámites oficiales de exportación?
LCOD_LBL_TAB1_ANSWER_7: Los especialistas en comercio exterior, con quienes usted ha coordinado y acordado, intentan encontrar clientes en el extranjero para sus productos y exportarlos, y llegar a un acuerdo con el cliente sobre condiciones como el precio, el pago, la entrega, las características del producto, etc. Además, los trámites oficiales que quedan con respecto a su empresa, como elegir el transportista, cargar la mercancía, recibir los permisos necesarios, preparar los documentos de exportación y enviar los documentos a las instituciones pertinentes, los realiza usted. Su especialista en comercio exterior le explica cómo preparar documentos con ejemplos y le brinda apoyo en los procesos. Podrás recibir servicios adicionales de tu gestor de comercio exterior y también podrás solicitarle la realización de otros trámites como documentos de exportación, etc.
LCOD_LBL_TAB2_QUEST_1: Soy un pequeño artesano o estoy produciendo productos en mi pequeño taller, ¿podemos exportar con ustedes?
LCOD_LBL_TAB2_ANSWER_1: Sí, nuestro principal objetivo es que los pequeños artesanos, los que fabrican en pequeños talleres, puedan realizar su primera exportación con nosotros.
LCOD_LBL_TAB2_QUEST_2: ¿Se requiere que sepa inglés o algún idioma extranjero para exportar y comunicarme con clientes extranjeros?
LCOD_LBL_TAB2_ANSWER_2: Los especialistas en comercio exterior serán los responsables de la comunicación con los clientes de importación/exportación, no es necesario saber ningún idioma extranjero.
LCOD_LBL_TAB2_QUEST_3: ¿Necesitamos tener un departamento de exportación para exportar?
LCOD_LBL_TAB2_ANSWER_3: No es necesario que usted tenga dicho departamento porque la búsqueda de clientes, la comunicación con los clientes y el trato con los clientes estarán a cargo de especialistas en comercio exterior registrados dentro de nuestra constitución.
LCOD_LBL_TAB2_QUEST_4: Tengo personal de exportación o departamento de exportación, ¿puedo trabajar con usted para conseguir nuevos clientes?
LCOD_LBL_TAB2_ANSWER_4: Sí, trabajar con nosotros será ventajoso para conseguir nuevos clientes y exportar a nuevos países.
LCOD_LBL_TAB2_QUEST_5: ¿El tipo de producto o servicio que quiero exportar afecta el éxito de las exportaciones?
LCOD_LBL_TAB2_ANSWER_5: El tipo de producto, su tamaño pequeño o grande, su precio alto o bajo no son el tema. Lo importante es que el producto o servicio sea aceptado en los mercados exteriores.
LCOD_LBL_TAB2_QUEST_6: ¿La exportación se realizará a través de mi propia empresa o de AMAZING TEKNOLOJI Ve PAZARLAMA A.S. (Inc.) ¿Compañía?
LCOD_LBL_TAB2_ANSWER_6: La exportación se realizará a través de su empresa.
LCOD_LBL_TAB2_QUEST_7: ¿Necesito tener una empresa para poder exportar?
LCOD_LBL_TAB2_ANSWER_7: Sí, debes ser una empresa privada, una sociedad de responsabilidad limitada, un colectivo o una sociedad anónima para poder exportar.
LCOD_LBL_TAB2_QUEST_8: ¿Se compartirá conmigo la información del cliente comprador extranjero?
LCOD_LBL_TAB2_ANSWER_8: La información del cliente se compartirá con usted previo acuerdo con el comprador sobre las características del producto a exportar, precio del producto, pago, método de entrega, etc., y el cumplimiento de las condiciones del contrato.
LCOD_LBL_TAB3_QUEST_1: ¿Cuál es el sistema de trabajo y qué se espera de usted?
LCOD_LBL_TAB3_ANSWER_1: Un fabricante de nuestro portafolio se pondrá en contacto contigo según la categoría de producto en la que seas experto. Después de eso, intenta exportar el producto investigando a los clientes sobre los productos o contactando a sus compradores existentes (importadores) en la cartera e informándoles sobre los productos. En resumen, se espera que encuentre clientes para los productos que se exportan o importan, informe al fabricante/distribuidor sobre cuestiones de exportación y brinde tutoría hasta la entrega del producto.
LCOD_LBL_TAB3_ANSWER_2: Le resultará ventajoso enumerar aquí los países a los que ha exportado anteriormente.
LCOD_LBL_TAB3_QUEST_3: ¿Alguien más sabrá que estoy haciendo una ocupación secundaria? ¿Mi información de identidad seguirá siendo confidencial?
LCOD_LBL_TAB3_ANSWER_3: Esta información se mantiene confidencial por nuestra empresa. Dependiendo de su solicitud, las empresas miembros de babroo pueden ver la información de su perfil en su totalidad o de forma limitada. Aparte de eso, otros terceros no pueden ver su información.
LCOD_LBL_TAB3_QUEST_4: ¿Qué aporta el llenado correcto de productos experimentados?
LCOD_LBL_TAB3_ANSWER_4: Los detalles del producto son importantes porque las empresas lo encuentran mediante la búsqueda de productos. Puede separar los productos con los que tiene experiencia utilizando comas y espacios entre ellos.
LCOD_LBL_TAB3_QUEST_5: ¿Cuánto dinero ganaré? ¿Cuándo se acreditará el dinero en mi cuenta? ¿Quién es responsable de los impuestos relacionados con los salarios que me pagan?
LCOD_LBL_TAB3_ANSWER_5: Una tasa de comisión dependiendo de la exportación que realizarás se determinará entre la empresa exportadora y tú. Después de llegar a un acuerdo con la empresa, comienza las transacciones. Luego de exportar, se le paga su comisión a la tasa determinada luego de que se oficialicen las deducciones de retenciones.
LCOD_LBL_TAB3_ANSWER_6: Podrás asumir la responsabilidad de varios fabricantes/distribuidores al mismo tiempo para cada sector diferente en el que seas experto. Así, podrás obtener más ingresos.
LCOD_LBL_TAB3_QUEST_7: ¿Cuándo se espera de mí que la empresa que está bajo mi responsabilidad realice exportaciones? ¿Qué pasa si no puedo tener la empresa para exportar?
LCOD_LBL_TAB3_ANSWER_7: Se espera que la empresa exporte lo más rápido posible. Si la exportación no se realiza, termina el deber de su responsabilidad de exportación para el productor/distribuidor actual.
LCOD_LBL_TAB3_QUEST_8: ¿Por qué es importante una imagen de perfil corporativo?
LCOD_LBL_TAB3_ANSWER_8: Es una característica a la que las empresas prestan atención cuando buscan un especialista en comercio exterior.
LCOD_LBL_COMPANY_FOREIGN_TRADE: Empresas que desarrollan el comercio exterior
LCOD_LBL_SUCCESS_SPECIALISTS: Especialistas que han captado nuevos contactos comerciales.
LCOD_TEXT_KVKK_FULL:
. DATA PRIVACY COMMITMENT
 

1.1. This Privacy and Personal Data Protection and Processing Policy ("Policy") determines the principles to be followed by and/or within the Company while fulfilling its obligations to protect personal data in accordance with the provisions of the relevant legislation, primarily the Law on the Protection of Personal Data No. 6698 ("KVKK") and while processing personal data. 

 

1.2. The Company undertakes to act in accordance with this Policy and the procedures to be applied in accordance with the Policy with respect to the personal data it possesses.

 

2. PURPOSE OF THE POLICY
 

The main purpose of this Policy is to provide explanations regarding the personal data processing activities carried out by the Company in accordance with the law and the systems adopted for the protection of personal data. and to ensure transparency regarding the protection of personal data, which is a constitutional right, by informing identified and/or identifiable real persons whose personal data are processed by the Company. In this context, it is aimed to determine the conditions regarding the use of personal data obtained during the use of the websites and applications located at “babroo.com”, “bigfair.com” and various web addresses that may be created by the Company thereafter (“Site(s)”) managed by the Company and/or received from third parties or users. 

3. SCOPE OF THE POLICY
 

3.1. This Policy is applied to the activities carried out for the processing and protection of all personal data managed by the Company.

 

3.2. This Policy relates to all personal data of our users, customers, suppliers, job candidates, employees, partners, authorities, authorities and/or employees of institutions and organizations we cooperate with, as well as third parties, processed automatically or non-automatically provided that it is part of any data recording system by the Company. Users who register/submit their personal data to the Sites by using the Sites and users who have accepted the Website Terms of Use and Membership Agreement will be deemed to have accepted this Policy. This Policy will also have the nature of information regarding the processing of personal data of users outside the membership relationship.



3.3. This Policy does not apply to data that does not qualify as personal data.



3.4. This Policy may be amended from time to time with the approval of the Company's Board of Directors if required by the regulations on the protection of personal data.


4. DEFINITIONS
 

The definitions in this Policy have the following meanings;



“Explicit Consent” refers to the consent of the data owner/relevant person to the processing of his/her personal data, based on information and with free will.



“Constitution” refers to the Constitution of the Republic of Turkey, dated 7 November 1982 and numbered 2709, published in the Official Gazette, dated 9 November 1982 and numbered 17863.



“Employees and Authorities of Cooperating Institutions” refers to the employees of institutions and organizations with which the Company has any kind of relations and the authorities of these institutions and organizations.



“Destruction” refers to the deletion, destruction or anonymization of personal data.



“Recording Medium” Personal data processed by fully or partially automatic means or non-automatic means provided that it is part of any data recording system. refers to any recording medium containing data.



“Personal Data(s)” refers to any information relating to an identified or identifiable natural person (within the scope of this Policy, the expression “Personal Data” shall also include “Special Personal Data” defined below, to the extent appropriate).



“Personal Data Inventory” refers to the personal data processing activities carried out by the Company in connection with its business processes; It refers to the inventory created by associating personal data with the data processing purposes, data category, transferred recipient group and data subject group and explains in detail the maximum period required for the purposes for which personal data is processed, personal data planned to be transferred to foreign countries and the measures taken regarding data security.



“Processing of Personal Data” refers to all kinds of operations performed on data such as obtaining, recording, storing, preserving, changing, rearranging, disclosing, transferring, taking over, making available, classifying or preventing the use of Personal Data, either fully or partially by automatic means or non-automatic means provided that it is part of any data recording system.



“Anonymization of Personal Data” It refers to the process of not matching personal data with other data and not using any of the following methods:urette refers to making it impossible to associate an identified or identifiable real person.



“Deletion of Personal Data” refers to the process of making personal data inaccessible and non-reusable for the relevant users in any way.



“Destruction of Personal Data” refers to the process of making personal data inaccessible, non-recoverable and non-reusable by anyone in any way.




“Member/User” refers to the person/persons who use and become members of the websites and applications managed by the Company such as babroo.com, bigfair.com and the Company that are likely to be developed in the future.



“Board” refers to the Personal Data Protection Board.



“Institution” refers to the Personal Data Protection Institution.



“LPPD Regulations” refers to the Law on the Protection of Personal Data No. 6698 and other relevant legislation on the protection of personal data, regulatory and binding decisions, principles, provisions, instructions given by supervisory authorities, courts and other official authorities, as well as applicable international agreements and all other legislation regarding the protection of data.



“Special Personal Data” refers to data regarding the race, ethnic origin, political opinion, philosophical belief, religion, sect or other belief, appearance and dress, association, foundation or union membership, health, sexual life, criminal conviction and security measures of individuals, as well as biometric and genetic data. 

 

“Periodic Destruction” refers to the process of deletion, destruction or anonymization to be carried out ex officio at repeated intervals in the event that all personal data processing conditions are eliminated.

 

“Data Processor” refers to the natural or legal person who processes personal data within the organization of the data controller or in accordance with the authority and instructions received from the data controller.

 

“Data Owner/Relevant Person” refers to the natural person whose personal data is processed by the Company.

 

“Data Controller” refers to the natural or legal person who processes personal data by specifying the purposes and methods of processing and who is responsible for the establishment and management of the data recording system.

 

“Visitor” refers to the natural persons who have entered and/or visited the physical premises or the company headquarters of the Company for various purposes.

 

“Customer” refers to the Company through online sales channels such as the website and mobile applications or through intermediary service providers. refers to real persons who have purchased or will receive services.


5. PROTECTION OF PERSONAL DATA


According to Article 20 of the Constitution, everyone has the right to request the protection of their Personal Data. With this Policy, the Company; In accordance with Article 12 of the KVKK, the Company takes the necessary administrative and technical measures to prevent the unlawful processing of personal data, to prevent unlawful access to personal data and to ensure the preservation of personal data, and carries out and has the necessary inspections carried out in this context in order to ensure the appropriate level of security.



 The main measures taken by the Company regarding "data security" in accordance with Article 12 of the KVKK are listed below.



 The personal data processed by the Company are analyzed and the risks that may arise regarding the protection of this data are determined.

 All activities carried out by the Company are analyzed in detail by all business units and departments, and a personal data inventory is created as a result of this analysis, and the necessary legal and technical measures are taken by determining the risky areas in this inventory.

 The personal data processing activities carried out by the Company are audited with information security systems, technical systems and legal methods, and expert personnel are employed within the scope of technical issues.

 The Company employees are responsible for the processing of the personal data they learn in accordance with the KVKK and the relevant They are informed that this information will not be disclosed to others in violation of the provisions of the legislation and will not be used for purposes other than processing and that this obligation will continue after they leave their jobs, and the necessary commitments are obtained from them in this regard.

 The service providers with whom the Company has relations and other third party business partners, including but not limited to these, are informed about the personal data protection law and taking the necessary measures in accordance with this law, and these issues are contractually undertaken.

 The Company carries out/has carried out the necessary audits in order to ensure continuity in the protection of personal data and taking the necessary measures in accordance with this law.

 The Company takes the necessary technical measures to ensure the protection of personal data and regularly reports to the relevant person (InformationThe relevant parties work to produce the necessary technological solutions after reviewing the report.

 The Company uses software that includes virus protection systems and firewalls and establishes backup programs to ensure the safe storage of personal data.

 Personal data stored in the Electronic Recording Environment is restricted to the access of relevant users and authorizations are reviewed regularly. Files stored in the Physical Recording Environment are kept in archive cabinets within the Company and are subsequently destroyed in accordance with the determined procedures.

 In the event that personal data processed by the Company in accordance with the law is obtained by others through illegal means and data security is violated, the Company has prepared a data breach response plan that requires this situation to be reported to the Data Owner and the Board as soon as possible.


Protection of Special Personal Data



Special Personal Data is data to which special importance is attached in accordance with the KVKK due to the risk of causing victimization and discrimination to individuals when processed unlawfully and is protected with sensitivity and care by the Company.



The Company carries out the necessary activities to ensure the security of Special Personal Data and takes the necessary technical and administrative measures to comply with the legal requirements and the sufficient measures specified by the Board in order to ensure that these data are processed in accordance with the KVKK Regulations.



6. PRINCIPLES OF PROCESSING PERSONAL DATA


In accordance with Article 4 of the KVKK; the Company processes personal data in accordance with the law and the rules of good faith, accurate and, when necessary, up-to-date, specific, clear and legitimate purposes, and in a purpose-related, limited and proportionate manner:


6.1. Processing of Personal Data in Accordance with the Law and the Rules of Good Faith



Personal Data is processed by the Company in accordance with the law and the rules of good faith and based on the principle of proportionality. In this context, the Company takes into account the proportionality requirements in the processing of personal data and does not use personal data for purposes other than those for which it is processed.


6.2. Taking Necessary Measures to Keep Personal Data Accurate and, Where Necessary, Up-to-date



The Company takes the necessary measures to ensure that Personal Data is complete, accurate and up-to-date, taking into account the fundamental rights of personal data owners and its own legitimate interests, and updates the relevant Personal Data in the event that the Data Owner requests changes to Personal Data. 



6.3. Processing of Personal Data for Specific, Legitimate and Clear Purposes



Before processing Personal Data, the Company determines the purpose for which the Personal Data will be processed. The Company processes Personal Data in connection with and to the extent necessary for its commercial activities. In this context, the Data Owner is informed within the scope of the KVKK Regulations and, where necessary, Explicit Consent is obtained. 



6.4. Personal Data Being Related, Limited and Proportionate to the Purpose of Processing

 

The Company processes Personal Data only in exceptional cases under the KVKK Regulations (KVKK Article 5.2 and Article 6.3) or in line with the purpose within the scope of the Explicit Consent obtained from the Data Owner (KVKK Article 5.1 and Article 6.2) and in accordance with the principle of proportionality. The Company avoids processing Personal Data that is not relevant to the achievement of the purpose and is not needed.


6.5. Preserving Personal Data for as Long as Necessary and Deleting It Thereafter


6.5.1. The Company retains Personal Data for the period specified in the relevant legislation or necessary for the purpose of processing. If the Company wishes to retain Personal Data for a period longer than the period stipulated in the relevant legislation or required by the purpose of Processing Personal Data, the Company shall act in accordance with the obligations specified in the LPPD Regulations.



6.5.2. After the period required by the purpose of Processing Personal Data has expired, Personal Data shall be deleted, destroyed or anonymized. In this case, it is ensured that third parties to whom the Company transfers the Personal Data also delete, destroy or anonymize the Personal Data.




7. PROCESSING OF PERSONAL DATA



Personal Data may only be processed by the Company within the scope of the procedures and principles specified below in accordance with Articles 5 and 6 of the LPPD.


7.1. Explicit Consent


7.1.1. Personal Data is processed after the Data Owner is informed within the framework of the Disclosure Obligation and if the Data Owner gives Explicit Consent. 

 

7.1.2. Before the Explicit Consent is obtained within the framework of the Disclosure Obligation, the Data Owner is informed of his/her rights.

 

7.1.3. The Explicit Consent of the Data Owner is obtained through methods in accordance with the KVKK Regulations. Explicit Consent is provably provided by the Company in accordance with the KVKK Regulations.ri. 

 

 

7.2. Processing of Personal Data Without Explicit Consent

 

7.2.1. In cases where the Processing of Personal Data without Explicit Consent is envisaged under the KVK Regulations (KVKK Article 5.2 and Article 6.3), the Company may process Personal Data without seeking the Explicit Consent of the Data Owner. In such a case, the Company processes the Personal Data within the framework of the limits set by the KVKK Regulations.

 

In this context:


7.2.1.1. Personal Data may be processed by the Company without Explicit Consent in order to protect the life or physical integrity of the Data Owner who is unable to express his consent due to actual impossibility or whose consent is not legally valid and/or a person other than the Data Owner.

 

7.2.1.2. If the conditions for it to be directly related to the establishment, implementation, performance or termination of a contract are met, Personal Data of the parties to the contract may be processed by the Company without the Explicit Consent of the Data Owner. 

 

7.2.1.3. If the Processing of Personal Data is mandatory for the Company to fulfill its legal obligation, Personal Data may be processed by the Company without the Explicit Consent of the Data Owner. 

 

7.2.1.4. Personal Data that has been made public by the Data Owner may be processed by the Company without the Explicit Consent limited to the purpose of making it public. 

 

7.2.1.5. If the processing of Personal Data without the Explicit Consent is the only possible way to establish, exercise or protect a right, Personal Data may be processed by the Company without the Explicit Consent with the knowledge of the Data Controller Authorized Person. 

 

7.2.1.6. Provided that it does not harm the fundamental rights and freedoms of the Data Owner, if data processing is mandatory for the Company's legitimate interests, Personal Data may be processed by the Company without Explicit Consent.


8. PROCESSING OF SPECIAL NATURE PERSONAL DATA

8.1. Special Nature Personal Data may be processed only if the Data Owner gives Explicit Consent or if processing is expressly required by law for Special Nature Personal Data other than sexual life and personal health data.


8.2. Personal Data related to health and sexual life may only be processed without Explicit Consent for the purposes of protecting public health, preventive medicine, medical diagnosis, treatment and care services, planning and management of healthcare services and their financing. Therefore, until otherwise provided for in the KVKK Regulations, personal health data and sexual life data may only be processed within the scope of Explicit Consent or by the Company physician who is under an obligation of confidentiality.


8.3. When processing special personal data, adequate measures determined by the Board are taken. 



9. METHODS RELATED TO COLLECTION OF PERSONAL DATA

The Company collects Personal Data in accordance with the principles explained above. In this context, Personal Data is collected using the following methods:



 Personal Data Provided Directly to the Company: Personal data you provide on your own initiative before or during the use of the Site or during registration in order to benefit from the services offered by the Company or to be included in the Company's expert network. This personal data covers all Personal Data provided directly to the Company by Users. The Sites will not allow you to transfer Personal Data to the Company if this Policy is not approved.



 Data We Obtain When You Use the Sites: While you are using the Site, we access some of the Users' data that do not contain personal information through certain software or technological tools. This information is collected through various technologies and does not contain any information that identifies you. This information is collected by the Company or by companies providing services to the Company. This information is statistical information such as the number of people using the Site daily, which countries or cities the Site is visited from, how long the Users stay on the Site, etc. The Company may share this information that does not contain Personal Data with its affiliates, business partners or third parties. Amazing may provide this statistical data to its current and potential business partners or third parties in order to define its services.



The Company, as the data controller, within the framework of its legal obligations arising from the KVKK; In order for you to benefit from the services of our brands and sites, to inform you about our campaigns upon your approval, to record your suggestions and complaints, to create better service standards for you, to determine and implement Amazing commercial and business strategies, you may collect your personal data verbally, in writing or electronically through the website, social media channels, mobile applications and similar means.we collect personal data.

 

9. DELETION, DESTRUCTION AND ANONYMIZATION OF PERSONAL DATA
 

9.1. In line with Article 138 of the Turkish Penal Code No. 5237 and Article 7 of the KVKK, although personal data have been processed in accordance with the relevant legal provisions, if the reasons requiring processing are eliminated, the relevant Personal Data shall be deleted, destroyed or anonymized by the Company ex officio and/or upon such request by the Data Owner.

 

9.2. In cases where the Company has the right and/or obligation to preserve personal data in accordance with the relevant legislation, it reserves the right not to fulfill the Data Owner's request.

 

9.3. The Company does not store Personal Data considering the possibility of using it in the future. 

 

10. TRANSFER OF PERSONAL DATA AND PROCESSING OF PERSONAL DATA BY THIRD PARTIES

 

10.1. Purpose of Transferring Personal Data to Third Parties

 

10.1.1. The Company may transfer the Personal Data it has obtained to a third natural or legal person in accordance with the KVKK Regulations. In this case, the Company ensures that third parties to whom it transfers Personal Data also comply with this Policy. In this context, the necessary protective regulations are added to the contracts concluded with the third party.

 

10.1.2. The Company may share the Personal Data of the User and the new data obtained by using this Personal Data with outsourcing service providers, cargo companies, law firms, research companies, call centers, software companies for complaint management and security, agencies, consultancy companies, companies in the printing sector, social media platforms, customers we serve, suppliers, audit companies or public institutions or organizations authorized to request this data due to a legal obligation, within the scope of the framework agreement of payment institutions operating within the scope of the permit granted by the Turkish Banking Regulation and Supervision Agency, in accordance with the identity documents of the payment institutions operating within the scope of the permit granted by the Turkish Banking Regulation and Supervision Agency, for the purposes specified in the Website Membership Agreement, performance of the Services, transfer of the Company to another company through merger or transfer, establishment of partnerships with companies in which the Company or its officers/shareholders are partners or in cooperation or merging their businesses with another company, development of the User experience (including improvement and personalization), ensuring the security of the Users, detection of fraud, development of the services, operational evaluation research, elimination of errors, verification of User identities and to achieve any of the purposes set forth in this Policy. for the purpose of verification, it may be shared with the relevant payment institutions and, but not limited to, the relevant authorities and third parties.

 

10.2. Transfer of Personal Data to Third Parties in Turkey

 

10.2.1. Personal Data may be transferred to the Company's affiliates in Turkey, service providers with which it cooperates or relevant third parties without Explicit Consent in exceptional cases specified in Article 5.2 and Article 6.3 of the KVKK, or on the condition that the Explicit Consent of the Data Owner is obtained in other cases (KVKK Article 5.1 and Article 6.2). 

 

10.2.2. The Company is responsible for ensuring that the transfer of Personal Data to third parties in Turkey complies with the KVK Regulations. 

 

10.3. Transfer to Third Parties Abroad

 

10.3.1. Personal Data may be transferred to the Company’s affiliates located abroad, its cooperating service providers and relevant third parties without Explicit Consent in exceptional cases specified in Article 5.2 and Article 6.3 of the LPPD or, in other cases, provided that the Explicit Consent of the Data Subject is obtained (Article 5.1 and Article 6.2 of the LPPD). 



10.3.2. In cases where Personal Data is transferred without Explicit Consent in accordance with the LPPD Regulations, one of the following conditions must also exist in terms of the foreign country to which the transfer will be made: 



Ø The foreign country to which the Personal Data is transferred has the status of countries with sufficient protection by the Board (please follow the updated list of the Board for the list),



Ø In the event that the foreign country to which the transfer will take place is not on the Board’s safe countries list, the Company and the Data Controllers in the relevant country must make a written commitment that sufficient protection will be provided and obtain permission from the Board. 



10.3.3. The Company employees and the Data Controller Officer are jointly and severally responsible for ensuring that the transfer of Personal Data to third parties abroad complies with the KVKK Regulations. 


11. RIGHTS OF THE DATA OWNER
 

11.1. The Company shall respond to the following requests of the Data Owner, whose Personal Data it holds, in accordance with the KVKK Regulations:

 

11.1.1. Learning whether or not the Company has processed Personal Data,

11.1.2. Requesting processing of Personal Datato request information regarding this,

11.1.3. To learn the purpose of processing the Personal Data and whether they are used for their intended purpose,

11.1.4. To know the third parties to whom the Personal Data is transferred at home or abroad,

11.1.5. To request correction of personal data if it is processed incompletely or incorrectly by the Company,

11.1.6. To request that the Personal Data be deleted, destroyed or made anonymous by the Company in the event that the reasons requiring processing of personal data are eliminated, evaluated within the scope of the purpose, duration and legitimacy principles,

11.1.7. To request that the transactions carried out within the scope of Articles 11.1.5 and 11.1.6 be notified to third parties to whom the personal data is transferred,

11.1.8. To object to a result that is against the Data Subject if the processed Personal Data is analyzed exclusively through automated systems,

11.1.9. To request compensation in case the Personal Data is processed unlawfully and the Owner suffers damages as a result. 



In cases where the Data Owner wishes to exercise his/her rights and/or thinks that the Company has not acted within the scope of this Policy while processing the Personal Data, he/she may submit his/her requests with a secure electronic signature to the e-mail address given below regarding the Data Controller, which may change from time to time, or by hand-delivering a petition with a wet signature and documents proving his/her identity to the postal address given below, which may change from time to time, or by sending it through a notary.

11.2. If the Data Owner submits their requests regarding the rights listed above to the Company in writing, the Company shall finalize the request free of charge within 30 (thirty) days at the latest, depending on the nature of the request. In the event that an additional cost arises for the completion of the requests by the Data Controller, the fees specified in the tariff determined by the Personal Data Protection Board may be requested by the Data Controller. The Data Controller accepts the request or rejects it by explaining the reason and notifies the relevant person in writing or electronically. If the request in the application is accepted, the Data Controller shall fulfill the necessary. If the application is caused by the Data Controller's error, the fee received shall be returned to the relevant person. 

 

12. DATA MANAGEMENT AND SECURITY
 

12.1. All employees involved in the relevant process are jointly and severally responsible for the protection of Personal Data in accordance with this Policy and the KVKK. 


12.2. Personal Data Processing activities by the Company are supervised by technical systems according to technological possibilities and implementation costs. 

 

12.3. Personnel knowledgeable on technical issues regarding Personal Data Processing activities are employed.

 

12.4. Company employees are informed and trained on the protection of Personal Data and their processing in accordance with the law.

 



12.5. Company employees may access Personal Data only within the scope of the authority granted to them and in accordance with the relevant KVKK. Any access and processing performed by the employee in excess of their authority is unlawful and is grounds for justified termination of their employment contract.

 

12.6. Each person allocated a Company device is responsible for the security of the devices allocated to their use.

 

12.7. Each Company employee or person working within the Company is responsible for the security of the physical files in their area of ​​responsibility.

 

12.8. Within the scope of the KVK Procedure, in case of requested or additionally requested security measures for the security of Personal Data, all employees are obliged to comply with the additional security measures and to ensure the continuity of these security measures. 

 

12.10. In order to store Personal Data in secure environments in the Company, software and hardware including virus protection systems and firewalls are installed in accordance with technological developments. 

 

12.11. Backup programs are used and adequate security measures are taken in order to prevent loss or damage to Personal Data in the Company. 

 

12.12. Documents containing Personal Data in the Company are protected with encrypted (encrypted) systems. In this context, Personal Data is not stored in common areas or on the desktop. Files and folders etc. containing Personal Data are not moved to the desktop or common folder, and information on Company computers is not transferred to USB etc. files without the prior written approval of the Company. cannot be transferred to another device or taken out of the Company.


12.13. Personal Data processed within the Companyis considered “Confidential Information” by the Company. 

 

12.14. Company employees are informed that their obligations regarding the security and confidentiality of Personal Data will continue after the termination of the employment relationship and an undertaking has been obtained from the Company employees to comply with these rules. 

 

13. TRAINING
 

13.1. The Company provides its employees with the necessary training on the protection of Personal Data within the scope of the Policy and the KVKK Procedures in its annex and the KVKK Regulations.

 

13.2. The definitions of Sensitive Personal Data and practices for their protection are specifically addressed in the trainings. 

 

13.3. If a Company employee accesses Personal Data physically or in a computer environment, the Company provides training to the relevant employee specifically on such accesses (e.g. the computer program accessed).

 

14. AUDIT
 

The Company has the right to audit the compliance of all employees, departments and contractors of the Company with this Policy and the PDP Regulations regularly and ex officio at any time without any prior notice and conducts the necessary routine audits within this scope. The Company establishes a PDP Procedure regarding these audits, submits it to the approval of the Board of Directors and ensures the implementation of the said procedure. 

 

15. VIOLATIONS
 

15.1. Each employee of the Company reports to the authorities any work, transaction or action that they consider to be contrary to the procedures and principles specified in the PDP Regulations and this Policy. In this context, the Company establishes an “Incident Response Plan” in accordance with this Policy and the PDP Procedures for the relevant violation. 

 

15.2. As a result of the information provided, the Company prepares the notification to be made to the Owner or the Institution regarding the violation, taking into account the provisions of the legislation in force on the subject, especially the KVK Regulations.


16. RESPONSIBILITIES
 

The responsibilities within the Company are, respectively, employee, department, and Company officials. In this context; The officials responsible for the implementation of the Policy are appointed by the Company management and changes are made in this context by the same means. 


17. CHANGES TO BE MADE TO THE POLICY
 

17.1. This Policy may be changed by the Company from time to time with the approval of the Company management.

 

17.2. The Company shares the updated Policy text with its employees via e-mail so that the changes it has made to the Policy can be reviewed or makes it accessible to the employees and the Data Owner through the web address below. 



 Relevant web address: www.babroo.com
